case_title: WILLIAMS GREGG VS GINSBURG BARBARA OWNER MANAGER POSTAL PLACE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $105.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS GREGG AS TO DEFENDANT GINSBURG BARBARA OWNER MANAGER POSTAL PLACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02
